I don't know if this helps, but:

Today I did zfs rollback on root again... But this time I logged out
from X, and that logged in....

For the first time, after root rollback my system didn't hang....

uname -a:
FreeBSD 192.168.128.100 8.0-BETA2 FreeBSD 8.0-BETA2 #0: Mon Jul 20
21:43:13 EEST 2009
root@192.168.128.100:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/ANTIGENERIC  i386

- --
Aldis Berjoza
